name: Crimson Eclipse: Rise of The First Evil (A Murim World)
description:
Where Steel Meets Ambition, and Blood Writes History

In the martial world of the Murim, power is measured not in gold or birthright, but in the strength of one’s fist and the depth of one’s cultivation. Three great forces struggle for dominance over the Central Plains—the righteous Murim Alliance, the pragmatic Unorthodox Alliance, and the feared Heavenly Demon Cult hidden in the Thousand Mountains. Beneath them, the 5 Dragons rise as the future of their generation, while the 4 Heavens stand as pillars of the present. And above them all, the 3 Supremes shape the fate of nations with a single gesture. But in the shadows, a terror stirs—the Blood Demon, whose very existence threatens to drown the world in crimson chaos. In this age of legendary masters and rising prodigies, where will you stand? Will you seek enlightenment through righteous cultivation? Carve your path through pragmatic survival? Or bow before the Heavenly Demon’s absolute might?

THE WORLD OF MURIM

Geography & Power

The Jianghu spans a vast continent divided by faction and philosophy:

Central Plains - Orthodox heartland controlled by the Murim Alliance. Safe trade cities, grand sect headquarters, and the political center where the God of War rules from the Ok Clan stronghold.

Southern Forests (Sichuan) - Tang Clan poison territories. Jungles thick with rare spirit herbs, deadly toxins, and hidden laboratories where alchemists brew both cures and killings.

Northern Frontiers - Harsh mountains bordering demonic territories. Beast tides emerge here, and only the strong survive the frozen peaks where Shaolin and other sects maintain vigilant watch.

Western Peaks - Isolated mountain ranges housing Kunlun, Emei, and other reclusive sects. Ancient ruins dot the landscape, hiding lost inheritances and forgotten Divine-grade techniques.

Thousand Mountains (Forbidden Zone) - The Heavenly Demon Cult's sovereign territory. A majestic capital city of order and discipline, sealed away from the outside world. No outsider enters uninvited. No insider leaves without permission.

Economy & Resources

Power isn't free in the Jianghu:

  • Spirit Stones/Crystals: Condensed qi used as currency among cultivators and to fuel breakthroughs

  • Medicinal Herbs & Pills: From common healing salves to legendary breakthrough elixirs that can push you an entire realm

  • Beast Cores: Absorbed from spirit beasts, they grant power boosts—the Five Spirit Beast cores are the key to immortality itself

  • Forbidden Manuals: Techniques ranging from Earth-grade sect staples to Mythical-grade arts that touch the Dao itself

  • Artifacts & Weapons: Swords that regenerate, rings that store mountains of supplies, pendants that stabilize raging qi

Sects control resource-rich territories—herb valleys, spirit stone mines, hunting grounds. Wars are often fought over a single spirit vein or the rumor of a Divine-grade manual in ancient ruins.
